error_signature: workflow trigger is set to 'On execution'
title: Popup workflow not triggering as expected
symptom: The workflow set up for a popup does not execute when the popup appears, leading to no data being fetched.
applies_when: Using a popup with a defined workflow
Workflow trigger is set to 'On execution'
not_this_if: Workflow is triggered correctly in other contexts
root_cause: The workflow trigger for popups is set to 'On execution', which means it requires an explicit call to execute. If not called, the workflow will not run when the popup is displayed.
fix_steps: Change the workflow trigger to 'On mounted' to execute when the popup appears.
Ensure the workflow is correctly set to fetch the required data.
agent_instruction: Change the popup workflow trigger to 'On mounted' to ensure it executes when the popup is displayed.
